parameters.subject: ={{$json.subject}}

{{$json.personalization.company_name}}

Hi {{$json.personalization.first_name}}!

{{$json.template === 'welcome' ? 'Welcome to our community! We\'re thrilled to have you on board. Get ready for exclusive content, special offers, and insider tips.' : $json.template === 'engagement' ? 'We have some exciting updates to share with you! Check out what\'s new and discover how we can help you achieve your goals.' : 'We noticed you haven\'t been around lately, and we miss you! We\'ve been working hard to bring you even more value.'}}

' : ''}} {{$json.personalization.content_highlights ? '

' + $json.personalization.content_highlights + '

' : ''}}

We're here to help you succeed. If you have any questions, just reply to this email!

Best regards,
The {{$json.personalization.company_name}} Team
